error.signature: openai.RateLimitError: Rate limit reached for model

verdict.summary: API rate limit hit. Too many requests per minute or tokens per minute exceeded.

dead_ends.action: Retry immediately in a tight loop
dead_ends.why_fails: Immediate retries increase load and may get you temporarily banned. Use exponential backoff.

dead_ends.action: Create multiple API keys to bypass rate limits
dead_ends.why_fails: Rate limits are per-organization, not per-key. Multiple keys from same org share the same limit.

workarounds.action: Batch requests and spread them over time
workarounds.how: Process queue with rate limiter: max N requests per minute

workarounds.action: Request rate limit increase from provider
workarounds.how: OpenAI: usage tier auto-upgrades with spend. Anthropic: request via console.
